title: Should You Buy Hasbro for Its High Dividend Yield?
text: The stock offers a tempting yield, but investors should understand the risks.

title: 9 February Inflation-Busting Ideal Dividend Dogs
text: March-April, 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barron's analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Inflation Busters.” Those five articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying-dividends.

title: Why Hasbro Stock Was Up Today
text: The quarter wasn't as bad as feared, but Hasbro expects revenue to decline again this year.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Dip Y/Y
text: Hasbro (HAS) fourth-quarter fiscal 2022 results hurt by the dismal performances of Franchise Brands, Partner Brands and Emerging Brands.

title: Hasbro, Inc. (HAS) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ:HAS ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 16, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Debbie Hancock - Vice President, Investor Relations Chris Cocks - Chief Executive Officer Deb Thomas - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Arpine Kocharyan - UBS Eric Handler - ROTH MKM Partners Megan Alexander - JPMorgan Gerrick Johnson - BMO Capital Markets Jaime Katz - Morningstar Linda Bolton-Weiser - D.A. Davidson Jason Haas - Bank of America Matthew Catton - Jefferies Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Hasbro Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Hasbro keeps expectations low for the start of 2023, but sees turnaround coming
text: Hasbro reported disappointing holiday sales, which it had anticipated given slowing consumer demand.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Hasbro (HAS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0.77% and 0.21%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Hasbro Extends Slump, Delivering Weaker-Than-Expected 2023 Forecast Along With Soft Q4 Results
text: Hasbro extended its streak of Wall Street disappointments, delivering a weaker-than-expected forecast for 2023 along with soft fourth-quarter financials reflecting a host of holiday-season challenges. Revenue slid 17% to about $1.7 billion in the quarter, while earnings per share came in at $1.31. Hasbro is projecting 2023 adjusted earnings of $4.45 to $4.

title: Hasbro Misses Earnings Estimates. It Could Be a Tough 2023.
text: Hasbro missed earnings and revenue estimates in the holiday quarter and warned of a challenging consumer discretionary environment in 2023.

title: Hasbro stock falls after toy maker misses profit and revenue expectations, gives downbeat full-year outlook
text: Shares of Hasbro Inc. HAS, +0.46% shed 0.7% in premarket trading Thursday, after the toy maker missed fourth-quarter profit and revenue expectations, as weakness in consumer products offset strength in Wizards of the Coast and gaming, and provided a downbeat full-year outlook. The company swung to a net loss of $128.9 million, or 93 cents a share, from net income of $82.2 million, or 59 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Hasbro Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2022 Financial Results
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a global branded entertainment leader, today reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year 2022.

title: Hasbro: Does The 2022 Decline Make The Stock A Buy?
text: Hasbro is a toy and board game manufacturer, that has a strong position among market leaders in the global market. The company has exhibited slow revenue and earnings growth over the past decade.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Gears Up for Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Hasbro (HAS) fourth-quarter 2022 results are likely to be affected by dismal performance of Partners Brands, Hasbro Gaming and TV, Film & Entertainment.

title: Is This Game Over for Hasbro Stock?
text: At 44 times earnings, investors have somehow decided that Hasbro stock is a bargain.

title: Bear of the Day: Hasbro (HAS)
text: This toy maker warned on Q4 and is cutting costs.

title: Is It Worth Toying Around With Hasbro's Drop?
text: Nerf gun in hand, Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS) fired a warning shot on January 27th that revealed how much the global economy is impacting its business. Ahead of next month's fourth-quarter earnings call, management dropped the bomb shareholders feared — ugly financial results and the need for an aggressive reorganization.
